_comment: Private metadata for mlx-movie-director model registry. GPT-OSS-20B text encoder for Microsoft Lens, MLX INT4 quantized. Both weight files below are gitignored (*.safetensors by root rule, tokenizer.json by models/**/tokenizer.json rule) — re-obtain via the commands in this manifest. Validated by `run.py check-manifests`. See docs/models.md for schema docs.
name: gpt-oss-20b
description: OpenAI GPT-OSS-20B text encoder (MoE FFN, 64/8 GQA, YARN RoPE, sliding window 128) for the Microsoft Lens 3.8B MMDiT. MLX INT4 quantized (group_size=32). Loads multi-layer hidden states at selected layers (5, 11, 17, 23). Used by app/lens_text_encoder.py + app/lens_pipeline.py.

files.name: model.safetensors
files.origin: Converted from ComfyUI NVFP4 source (not a direct HF download)
files.source_note: The NVFP4 source is a ComfyUI-managed download (~13GB). If absent, obtain it via ComfyUI-Manager (text_encoders section) or search HuggingFace for a gpt-oss-20b nvfp4 checkpoint.

files.name: tokenizer.json
files.origin: Standard GPT-OSS tokenizer (same as GPT-4o), downloaded from HuggingFace

convert_method.input_format: nvfp4 (ComfyUI quantization: uint8 packed FP4 + float8 block scales)
steps: Load NVFP4 safetensors on CPU (comfy_kitchen eager backend, CUDA-free)
Dequantize NVFP4 -> BF16 layer-by-layer (avoids 40GB RAM peak)
Split 3D MoE expert banks [E,O,I] -> per-expert 2D arrays [O,I]
